productName: Thunder Stix-Tilted-DOH-Glass Tip PreRoll 3-Pack (3.6g) / Gorilla Glue (IH)
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps GG#4 flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of pungent, earthy, and pine, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
